title: Telemetry, Latency, Capacity, Cache Effectiveness, and Fair-Use Operations · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Cache Fairuse Evaluation
summary: Logs contain full URLs and bodies, metrics use Pokemon names as labels, average latency hides stalls, cache hit rate lacks workload context, and optimization increases API traffic. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go cache fairuse evaluation increment in privacy-minimized capacity and fair-use evidence report. Learners progress…
objectives: Relate cache hit, miss, stale, duplicate suppression, request frequency, and user latency under changed workloads.
Measure representative cold and warm command latency with percentile, workload, environment, sample, and correctness context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
